description: Mock pricing profile for local Kubernetes clusters. Rates approximate mid-tier cloud (e.g., AWS us-east-1 on-demand).

notes.cpu_basis: Approximation of AWS m5.xlarge on-demand ($0.192/hr ÷ ~6 usable cores ≈ $0.032/core/hr).
notes.memory_basis: Approximation of AWS m5.xlarge on-demand ($0.192/hr ÷ ~16 GiB usable ≈ $0.012/GiB/hr), scaled down for a local dev cluster.
notes.usage: These values are used as a fallback when the OpenCost API is unreachable.
